name: Iced White Chocolate Mocha
description: Rich espresso combined with sweet white chocolate sauce and milk over ice.

name: Javachip Javakula
description: Blended icy coffee beverage mixed with rich chocolate chips and gourmet syrup.

name: Strawberry Milkshake
description: Thick, creamy, and indulgent classic milkshake bursting with real strawberry flavor.

name: The Big Breakfast
description: A hearty platter featuring farm-fresh eggs, premium breakfast meat, and artisanal toast.

name: Ham & Cheese Omelette
description: Fluffy folded egg omelette loaded with diced savory ham and melted premium cheese.

name: Classic Pancakes
description: Stack of warm, beautifully fluffy golden pancakes served with real sweet syrup.

name: Smoked Salmon Sandwich
description: Premium delicate smoked salmon slices layered with fresh greens on artisan bread.

name: Margherita Flatbread
description: Crisp baked flatbread crust topped with tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, and aromatic basil.

name: Quattro Flatbread
description: Savory artisan flatbread packed with an indulgent four-cheese blend and gourmet meat toppings.

name: Blueberry Cheesecake
description: Velvety smooth NY-style cheesecake topped with a sweet, vibrant mountain blueberry compote.

name: Nutella Croissant
description: Flaky, buttery golden layered croissant filled with rich, creamy chocolate hazelnut spread.

name: Classic Cinnamon Roll
description: Soft, sweet golden pastry dough swirled with rich cinnamon sugar and a smooth sugar glaze.

name: Torched Classic Cheesecake
description: Rich baked classic cheesecake featuring an elegant, caramelized, beautifully torched top surface.
